Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise-Canceling Wireless Over-Ear Headphones (Silver)

BH #SOWH1000XM5S • MFR #WH1000XM5/S
396 reviews
Print
Authorized Dealer
Key Features
  • 30mm Dynamic Drivers
  • 8-Microphone Active Noise Cancellation
  • 4 Beamforming Mics for Clear Calls
  • Up to 30 Hours of Playback with ANC On
No matter the situation, you can connect and listen without distraction when you use the silver WH-1000XM5 Noise-Canceling Wireless Over-Ear Headphones from Sony. The latest edition of Sony's heralded ANC headphones, the WH-1000XM5 goes further to boost clarity. Active noise cancellation uses two processors and eight mics to filter out more high and midrange sound. Four of the mics are beamforming and use Precise Voice Pickup technology to better isolate your voice for pristine hands-free calls. What you hear is also high-quality thanks to Hi-Res Audio support via a newly developed 30mm driver. Add in a lightweight design, additional convenience features, and up to 30 hours of power, and you have a pair of headphones that you can wear all day.

Sony WH-1000XM5 Overview

From Manufacturer

No matter the situation, you can connect and listen without distraction when you use the silver WH-1000XM5 Noise-Canceling Wireless Over-Ear Headphones from Sony. The latest edition of Sony's heralded ANC headphones, the WH-1000XM5 goes further to boost clarity. Active noise cancellation uses two processors and eight mics to filter out more high and midrange sound. Four of the mics are beamforming and use Precise Voice Pickup technology to better isolate your voice for pristine hands-free calls. What you hear is also high-quality thanks to Hi-Res Audio support via a newly developed 30mm driver. Add in a lightweight design, additional convenience features, and up to 30 hours of power, and you have a pair of headphones that you can wear all day.

Latest Updates
  • The following features are now available even when connected to LE Audio:
    • Digital Assistant—To use Digital Assistant and Head Tracking with LE Audio, please delete the pairing information of this headset from the connected device and then repair the devices after completing this update
    • Head Tracking
  • Support for Gemini Live is now available
  • Support for Audio Sharing with Fast Pair is available
  • The Find Hub feature can now be used to locate each headset (left and right) individually
  • The Find Hub feature can be disabled without using the charging case
  • Enhances system software security features

 

Benefits and Improvements
  • Adds services that support Quick Access and Scene-based Listening
  • Allows you to choose from three Bluetooth connection methods on some smartphones:
    • Prioritize Sound Quality
    • Prioritize Stable Connection
    • Low Latency
  • Enhances system software security features
  • Improves general performance
  • Adds support for the following features:
    • Auto Switch
    • Google Fast Pair through LE Audio priority connection
    • The new Google's Find Hub (only during dedicated Classic Audio connection)
  • Improves the operational stability of the headphones during music playback
  • Expanded the number of supported LE Audio devices
  • Improved the Bluetooth connection stability under specific conditions
  • Adds Quick Access support for Amazon Music—Depending on your country or region, this benefit may not be available.
  • Adds support for the use of the LE Audio feature with Xperia 1 V and Xperia 5 V smartphones
  • Improves overall functionality
  • Adds support for the beta version of LE Audio, which is optimal for games, etc.
  • Improves the hands-free calling quality

Note: An Xperia 1 IV or Xperia 5 IV phone is required updated to the latest version of the smartphone software

Keep Things Quiet When They're Not
You can enjoy a personal audio experience free of distraction thanks to Sony's processor and microphone combination. Even in noisy environments, Sony's Integrated Processor V1 lets the HD Noise Canceling Processor QN1 control eight different microphones to cancel out ambient noise, with the WH-1000XM5 improving on high and midrange frequency blocking. Then there's Sony's Auto NC Optimizer that automatically maximizes proper noise cancellation based on your wearing conditions and environment, such as taking atmospheric pressure into consideration.
Hi-Res Audio
With LDAC support, the WH-1000XM5 over-ear headphones can receive approximately three times the data than conventional Bluetooth transmissions, resulting in Hi-Res Audio from supported sources like select Android smartphones and media players. In addition, Sony's DSEE Extreme will upscale your compressed audio, using Edge-AI in real-time to recognize instruments, genre, and song elements to restore lost high-range sound. It's all pumped through newly developed 30mm drivers that are precisely engineered with the following range of sophisticated and high-quality components to achieve clear and consistent sound.

  • A soft TPU edge is used to help with noise cancellation, with a focus on low frequencies.
  • Carbon fiber composite with a high rigidity dome is used for sound clarity and natural sound, with a focus on high frequencies.
  • Fine Sound Resistor is used for even power distribution.
  • Optimized circuitry improves the WH-1000XM5's signal-to-noise ratio.
  • Everything is connected internally with premium lead-free solder that contains gold to improve connectivity.

 

They Can Hear You Now
Wireless headphones are as much for talking as they are for listening. When you're on the go, you need to be able to effectively communicate with others. Sony worked to keep your voice heard clearly, even in noisy situations, with Precise Voice Pickup technology. It was developed with AI machine learning and over 500 million voice samples to know how to remove ambient noise and isolate your voice, which they do using four beamforming microphones to focus on what you say.
Speak-to-Chat
Have a chat or order your morning coffee without taking off your headphones. Once you begin speaking, the music will automatically stop and let in ambient sound. Once you're done talking, noise cancelling and playback resume. This setting can be toggled in the Sony Headphones Connect app, available for iOS and Android devices.
Quick Attention
This mode can be activated at a moment's notice when you need to quickly hear someone or an announcement. When activated, it will lower music, call audio, and ringtone, letting ambient sound in so you can hear what you need to hear.
All-Day Power
On a full charge, the WH-1000XM5 headphones will run for up to 30 hours with ANC on, or up to 40 hours with it off. When talking, you get up to 24 hours of continuous communication time with ANC on, or up to 32 hours with it off.
Quick Charge
Forgot to charge your headphones? A quick 3-minute charge of the WH-1000XM5 wireless headphones gives you up to 3 hours of playback when using an optional USB-PD adapter.
Comfortable & Lightweight
With such a long battery life, the WH-1000XM5 headphones need to be comfortable, which is why Sony uses soft-fit leather and designed them to fit snugly, but with less pressure on your ears. Adjusting them for a personalized fit is easy with a stepless slider, seamless swivel and hanger, and silent joints.
Instant Pause and Play
The WH-1000XM5 wireless headphones know exactly when you're wearing them. When you take them off, sensors know and instantly pause your audio, resuming automatically once you put them back on.
Pair to Two Devices
Using multipoint technology, you can pair the WH-1000XM5 headphones to two different mobile devices and seamlessly switch between the two. So you can stream a TV show on your tablet, and then immediately take an incoming call, and get back to the show when you hang up.
Use Your Assistant
Simply say "OK Google" or "Alexa" to connect with others, get information, listen to notifications, and more through your compatible smartphone. Using Google Assistant or Siri, you can also control noise cancellation with your voice, listen to Microsoft Outlook emails, and join meetings in Microsoft Teams.
Fast and Swift Pairing
Both Google Fast Pair and Microsoft Swift Pair are technologies to take the frustration out of pairing the WH-1000XM5 headphones with your devices. Google Fast Pair gives you a pop-up and pairing with a tap as soon as they are close to a compatible Android device. Swift Pair works in a similar way with Windows 10 or 11 desktops, laptops, and tablets. Pop-up pairing guidance walks you through the process quickly and easily when pairing mode is selected.
Wired or Wireless
While primarily designed for wireless audio streaming, the WH-1000XM5 headphones can also be used as a wired pair of headphones with the included 3.94' audio cable. An ideal option for when you have an older, non-wireless device or you've run out of battery power.
360 Reality Audio
The WH-1000XM5 headphones supports Sony's 360 Reality Audio, which immerses you in your music, making you feel like you're in a personal live concert or in the studio with the artist. This can be enabled and customized in the Sony Headphones Connect app, and 360 Reality Audio is compatible with select music services.
360 Spatial Sound Personalizer
Continuing to provide a more personal listening experience, Sony supports the 360 Spatial Sound Personalizer app with the WH-1000XM5 headphones. This app optimizes your sound experience by capturing and analyzing your ear shape to develop a personal spatial sound field. This can be enjoyed when using the WLA-NS7 wireless transmitter and a compatible BRAVIA XR TV.
Dolby Atmos
Feel like you're in the movie with Dolby Atmos support when pairing the WH-1000XM5 headphones with Sony's WLA-NS7 wireless transmitter and a compatible BRAVIA XR TV.
Environmentally Friendly and Socially Responsible
Sony takes care to help our environment by using no plastic in the packaging, using a low-toxicity design with 99% of the paper used (except labels) being made from recycled and sustainable materials. Also, the plastic components of the headphones are comprised of recycled plastic sourced from automobile parts.
UPC: 027242923249
Items Included
  • Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise-Canceling Wireless Over-Ear Headphones (Silver)
  • Audio Cable (3.94')
  • USB-A to USB-C Cable
  • Collapsible Carrying Case
  • Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
Additional Resources

User Manual

2.9 MB

    Sony WH-1000XM5 Reviews

    Really Great

    By MWeb
    Rated 5 out of 5
    Date: 2026-04-17

    Yesterday I biked into a railing on a highway overpass and the headphones launched off my head and I watched terrified as they soared and landed on the shoulder. I managed to retrieve them and besides very minimal scuffing, they are still performing excellently.

    Operation during an RV trip.

    By JV0410
    Rated 2 out of 5
    Date: 2026-03-23

    I bought mine a year ago. On a recent RV trip, I used it to listen to XM on my phone and have noise cancellation from our very noisy RV. Battery had to be recharged after just a couple hours and during the recharge, the noise cancellation and music were inoperative. A battery replacement option would have been a good feature.

    See any errors on this page?

    Are these a good option for movie/tv watching? Is ...

    Are these a good option for movie/tv watching? Is there any delay?
    Asked by: Benjamin
    Hi Benjamin, Thanks for the question. Yes. This is a good headphones not just when listening to your music but also when watching movies. The WH-1000XM5 headphones have 2 processors that control 8 microphones for unprecedented noise cancellation and exceptional call quality. With a newly developed 30mm driver, DSEE – Extreme and Hi-Res audio support they provide awe-inspiring audio quality. Our Voice Pickup Technology uses 4 microphones that are calibrated to only pick up your voice, resulting in crystal clear calls. The automatic Speak to Chat feature will stop your music once you start talking and let in the ambient sound. With up to 30 hours of battery life and a quick charge feature. The new lightweight WH-1000XM5 headphones provide all day comfort in an elegant design. Thank you very much for the perfect star review and for choosing Sony! - Craig
    Answered by: SonyListens
    Date published: 2023-07-13

    During calls through the headphones, can you hear ...

    During calls through the headphones, can you hear your own voice when you’re talking?
    Asked by: Christopher
    Yes, you will be able to hear your own voice when you're using the Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise-Canceling Wireless Over-Ear Headphones (Black) for a phone call.
    Answered by: Michael S
    Date published: 2024-08-22

    will this block the frequencies of construction ...

    will this block the frequencies of construction noise (from next door)? metal on metal saws, drills, etc
    Asked by: Cj
    Hi Cj, thank you for inquiring about the WH1000XM5. The WH1000XM5 has an improved noise canceling function specifically for high-frequencies similar to drills, etc. The WH-1000XM5 headphones have 2 processors that control 8 microphones for unprecedented noise cancellation and exceptional call quality. With a newly developed 30mm driver, DSEE – Extreme and Hi-Res audio support they provide awe-inspiring audio quality. Our Voice Pickup Technology uses 4 microphones that are calibrated to only pick up your voice, resulting in crystal clear calls. The automatic Speak to Chat feature will stop your music once you start talking and let in the ambient sound. With up to 30 hours of battery life and a quick charge feature. The new lightweight WH-1000XM5 headphones provide all day comfort in an elegant design. Hope this helps. Erin
    Answered by: SonyListens
    Date published: 2023-03-17

    Are these sweat resistant?

    Are these sweat resistant?
    Asked by: Amber
    No, the Sony WH-1000XM5 are not sweat-resistant; they do not carry any IP rating and aren’t designed for workouts or heavy perspiration.
    Answered by: Nick Y
    Date published: 2025-11-24

    Where are these made?

    Where are these made?
    Asked by: Michael
    Hi Michael, thanks for your question. The XM5 is made in our factory in Malaysia. Hope this helps! - Erin
    Answered by: SonyListens
    Date published: 2023-04-09

    What is the material of WH-100XM5's ear cups? are ...

    What is the material of WH-100XM5's ear cups? are they made of genuine leather?
    Asked by: Nikolai
    The Sony Sony WH-1000XM5 earcups are made of synthetic leather.
    Answered by: Geoffrey
    Date published: 2022-12-15

    Does the bluetooth work with Sony TVs?

    Does the bluetooth work with Sony TVs?
    Asked by: Yee Fai
    Yes, the Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise-Canceling Wireless Over-Ear Headphones (Black) BH #SOWH1000XM5B can be used with a Sony TV as long as it supports the A2DP Bluetooth profile.
    Answered by: Miguel M
    Date published: 2023-09-08

    Does the ANC work with a wired connection like ...

    Does the ANC work with a wired connection like in-flight movies or with an older MP3 player?
    Asked by: Michael
    Yes, the Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise-Canceling Wireless Over-Ear Headphones (Black) BH #SOWH1000XM5B works with ANC when using wired mode.
    Answered by: Miguel M
    Date published: 2023-07-03

    Accessibility Statement
    Whatever You Need, We've Got It
    We use cookies to improve your web browsing experience, enhance site security, and for marketing and promotional purposes. Cookies allow us to do things like remember your preferences and provide improved search results. For more information visit our web privacy policy here.
    Manage Cookie Preferences
    Customize Your Cookie Settings
    Cookies are small data files that allow a website to collect and store data on your desktop computer, laptop or mobile device. Cookies help us to provide important features and functionality on our websites and mobile apps. We use them to improve your customer experience.
    These technologies are strictly necessary to provide you with services available through our websites and to use some of its features, such as form submissions, media playback. To disable all cookies please use your browsers settings.
    Cookies collect information about how you use a website, like which pages you visited and which links you clicked on. Their sole purpose is to improve website functions. This includes cookies from third-party analytics services as long as the cookies are for the exclusive use of the owner of the website visited.
    These cookies allow a website to remember choices you have made in the past, like what language you prefer, what region you are in, or what your user name and password are so you can automatically log in.
    These cookies track your online activity to help advertisers deliver more relevant advertising or to limit how many times you see an ad. These cookies can share that information with other organizations or advertisers. These are persistent cookies and almost always of third-party provenance.
